name: VSGO V-C01E Lens Cleaning Kit
description: Lenses and cameras such as Canon, Sony, Nikon, Pentax, Panasonic, Sigma, Tamron are large investments and need premium care. VSGO product used on your lens or camera will not only care for your investment and ensure long life but will enable you to achieve optimum results and lens and camera performance.

features.Key Features :: All products manufactured in a CLEANROOM* environment | Ideal for Cleaning Cameras, Lenses, Smartphones, Glasses and LCD Screens | Vacuum packaged | Compact and portable | Gel-like, Non-toxic Screen cleaning solution
features.What's in The Box :: 1x Lens Cleaning Spray Bottle | 1x Lens Cleaning Solution (20ml) | 2x Dustless Cotton Swabs
